name: Illustrations
description: Placeholder patterns and decorative elements used for empty states, onboarding, and feature highlights.

items.name: No Data
items.desc: Used when charts or tables have no data to display.

items.name: No Results
items.desc: Used when a search or filter returns no matches.

items.name: No Items
items.desc: Used when a list or collection is empty.

sections.title: Guidelines
items: Use Lucide icons at larger sizes (32-48px) with muted backgrounds for empty states
Gradient patterns should use primary color at low opacity (5-10%)
Keep illustrations minimal and functional — avoid decorative clutter
All illustrations must work in both light and dark mode
